description_long: This is a rounded, double-handled ceramic vase with a wide, flat rim and a short neck. The body is decorated with a band of stylized, dark floral motifs set against a lighter background, while the lower half is a deep, almost black color. The handles are small and stubby, positioned symmetrically on either side, with a single, more prominent handle arching from the rim to the shoulder. The surface shows some irregularities and faded spots, suggesting age or weathering. The overall form is reminiscent of ancient Greek or Mediterranean pottery, with a utilitarian yet decorative appearance.
description: A rounded, double-handled ceramic vase with dark floral motifs and a wide, flat rim, showing signs of age and weathering.
description_view_0: Front view showing the floral motifs, both small side handles, and the wide rim clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the prominent arched handle and one small side handle, with partial floral decoration visible.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the arched handle and the plain, dark surface with minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the arched handle, one small side handle, and a partial glimpse of the floral motif band.
